Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "PETCH-0A00-1000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Petch (aka Pengo).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0A00 which copies a jump table back to $0200 where it was originally, allowing the dump to start at $0400.
